input:
What would you say to a woman of beauty, wealth and position who is willing to marry you? Would you marry her?” He said: “Who is that woman?” She answered: “Khadījah.” He asked: “Who can arrange such a marriage for me?” She said: “Leave that to me.” His response was: “I will do it, willingly.” The First Marriage When Khadījah was sure of Muhammad’s reaction, she sent him a message asking him to come and see her. She said to him: “Cousin, [she used this term in the widest sense, since she was a very distant cousin of Muhammad.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 3: From Youth to Maturity

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 3: From Youth to Maturity

characters.name: Khadījah bint Khuwaylid
characters.appearance: Late 30s, light brown skin, slender build, elegant posture. Wearing a simple yet elegant long-sleeved dark brown or black gown with intricate embroidery, a dark brown or black head covering with a khimar-style veil. Her long dark hair is covered and her hands are modestly wrapped in a cloth. Her eyes are kind and gentle.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 20s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by simple white attire.

output.moral_lesson: Good character and kindness can lead to great opportunities, and sometimes it’s the person who least expects it who can bring the greatest blessings.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad was asked if he would marry a beautiful woman who was willing to marry him. He asked who the woman was and was told it was Khadijah, a distant cousin. Khadijah sent him a message asking him to come and see her, and when he agreed, she proposed to him saying 'Cousin'.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, faceless. Khadijah shown with full face, kind and gentle. Modest clothing for Khadijah. No graphic content, suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Watercolor illustration in a traditional Middle Eastern art style. A woman with a kind face, wearing a dark brown or black long-sleeved gown and a khimar-style veil, sits in a modest 7th century Makkah home with a warm golden light. Behind her, a young man in a simple white thobe and white turban, stands with his back to the viewer, looking at her with interest. The room is simple, with clay pots and woven mats. Soft colors, gentle light. No modern objects.
